item.title: 2016 in review
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
A reôÙview of the evenôÙts that took plaôÙce this yeaôÙr, reôÙlated to soôÙftwaôÙre enôÙgiôÙneeôÙring and arôÙchiôÙtecôÙtuôÙre.

The conferences, talks, and events

TheôÙse are soôÙme of the evenôÙts I parôÙtiôÙciôÙpated in:

  • (2 Apr 2016) PROôÙTOôÙSEC 2016 [1]: A teôÙchôÙniôÙcal conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce about neôÙtwoôÙrkinôÙg, ôÙproôÙtoôÙcolôÙs, seôÙcuôÙriôÙty, and reôÙlated toôÙpiôÙcs.
  • (JuôÙly 2016) EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016: I attenôÙded seôÙveôÙral taôÙlks, traôÙiôÙnings, woôÙrksôÙhopôÙs, and preôÙsenôÙted a taôÙlk.
  • (10 Sep 2016) PyôÙthon Cû°rôÙdoôÙba meeôÙtup [6]: inôÙteôÙresôÙting meeôÙtup wheôÙre I ôÙpreôÙsenôÙted my taôÙlk at EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon and attenôÙded the sprinôÙts afteôÙrwarôÙdôÙs.
  • (14 Sep 2016) ArôÙqôÙConf MeeôÙtup ô¢Cû°ôÙmo es traôÙbaôÙjar disôÙtriôÙbuiôÙdo gloôÙbalôÙmenôÙte? ôÙCaôÙso Open StaôÙck [5]: HosôÙted in the Red HaôÙt's offiôÙces in BueôÙnos AiôÙres, this ôÙtaôÙlk was a veôÙry inôÙteôÙresôÙting one, on whiôÙch I learôÙned about the coôÙllaôÙboôÙraôÙtiôÙve way of woôÙrking of the Open StaôÙck teaôÙm, around the gloôÙbe.
  • (17 Nov 2016) PyôÙthon BarôÙceôÙloôÙna meeôÙtup.
  • (9 Dec 2016) BarôÙceôÙloôÙna SpaôÙrk meeôÙtup [2]
  • (22 Dec 2016) PyôÙthon BarôÙceôÙloôÙna DeôÙcemôÙber meeôÙtup [7]: I preôÙsenôÙted my taôÙlk aôÙbout clean coôÙde in PyôÙthon (yeôÙs, again :-), and theôÙre weôÙre two otheôÙr inôÙteôÙresôÙting taôÙlks. MiôÙne was the first one of the evenôÙinôÙg. The seôÙcond taôÙlk, was about zc.ôÙbuilôÙdout, an inôÙteôÙresôÙting tool for maôÙnaôÙging paôÙckaôÙges anôÙd enôÙviôÙronôÙmenôÙts in PyôÙthoôÙn, whiôÙch I first heard of at PyôÙcoôÙnAr (PôÙyôÙthon ArôÙgenôÙtiôÙna grouôÙp) 2012. The third and last taôÙlk, ôÙpreôÙsenôÙted a proôÙject naôÙmed aioôÙcaôÙche [8]: a caôÙche sysôÙtem imôÙpleôÙmenôÙted in asôÙynôÙcio, that suôÙpporôÙts mulôÙtiôÙple baôÙck-enôÙdôÙs. The taôÙlk waôÙlked us thôÙrouôÙgh the ôÙcoôÙde, its arôÙchiôÙtecôÙtuôÙre, and soôÙme use caôÙses wiôÙth deôÙmoôÙs.

Code wise

I started wiôÙth a smaôÙll conôÙtriôÙbuôÙtion to the coaôÙla proôÙject [3], and duôÙrinôÙg ôÙthe EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon sprinôÙts I conôÙtriôÙbuted to aiohôÙttp wiôÙth a puôÙll reôÙquesôÙt.

TheôÙre weôÙre two new reôÙleaôÙses of my vim conôÙfiôÙguôÙraôÙtion, verôÙsions v0.3 anôÙd v0.4 [4], whiôÙch is great beôÙcauôÙse is the sinôÙgle tool I use eveôÙry daôÙy, anôÙd it is niôÙce to haôÙve seôÙveôÙral imôÙproôÙveôÙmenôÙts on it.

I alôÙso enhanôÙced my dot fiôÙles, buôÙt ôÙthat is stiôÙll in beôÙta.

On general

A miôÙnor reôÙleaôÙse of PyôÙthoôÙn3.5, but most imôÙporôÙtanôÙtlôÙy: PyôÙthoôÙn3.6 waôÙs ôÙreôÙcenôÙtly reôÙleaôÙseôÙd!

TheôÙre weôÙre two reôÙleaôÙses of FeôÙdoôÙra, 24 and 25, and theôÙre weôÙre loôÙts of imôÙproôÙveôÙmenôÙts and chanôÙges in the LiôÙnux KerôÙnel.

ReôÙgarôÙding inôÙforôÙmaôÙtion seôÙcuôÙriôÙty, theôÙre weôÙre soôÙme isôÙsues in the LiôÙnux KerôÙneôÙl, alôÙso in appliôÙcaôÙtions (suôÙch as dirôÙty COôÙW, etc.), and a maôÙsôÙsiôÙve DDoS attaôÙck thaôÙt sôÙtroôÙke the InôÙterôÙnet on OcôÙtoôÙbeôÙr, due to IoT deôÙviôÙces being comôÙproôÙmiôÙsôÙeôÙd.

What to look forward to for the new year

  • I stiôÙll look foôÙrward for moôÙre conôÙtriôÙbuôÙtions to open sourôÙce, in parôÙtiôÙcuôÙlaôÙr wiôÙth CPôÙyôÙthoôÙn.
  • MoôÙre funcôÙtioôÙnal proôÙgraôÙmôÙming (SôÙcaôÙla/HaôÙskeôÙll maôÙyôÙbeôÙ), loôÙw-ôÙleôÙvel proôÙgraôÙmôÙming in ôÙC, and reôÙsearôÙch in the field of inôÙfoôÙsec.
  • Keep on parôÙtiôÙciôÙpaôÙting on teôÙchôÙniôÙcal conôÙfeôÙrenôÙceôÙs.

And a lot moôÙre.

[1]https://www.protosec.org/en/
[2]https://www.meetup.com/Spark-Barcelona/events/235763327/
[3]https://github.com/coala/coala
[4]https://github.com/rmariano/vim-config/releases
[5]https://www.meetup.com/es/ArquitecturaDeSoftware/events/233824352/
[6]https://www.meetup.com/es-ES/Cordoba-Python-Meetup/events/233741709/
[7]https://www.meetup.com/python-185/events/236196808/
[8]https://github.com/argaen/aiocache
